hero.heading: Gapflow and AWS Bedrock
hero.subheading: Build generative AI applications with foundation models from leading AI companies

documentation.title: Getting Started with AWS Bedrock
documentation.description: Connect AWS Bedrock to Gapflow and access foundation models from Anthropic, Meta, Stability AI, and more.

documentation.title: RAG Applications
documentation.description: Build Retrieval Augmented Generation systems with Knowledge Bases for accurate, grounded responses.

documentation.title: Model Customization
documentation.description: Fine-tune foundation models on your data for improved performance on specific tasks.

tutorials.title: Enterprise Chatbot with Guardrails
tutorials.description: Build a production chatbot with content filtering, PII detection, and topic restrictions.

tutorials.title: RAG Knowledge Base
tutorials.description: Create a knowledge base that retrieves and generates accurate answers from your documents.

tutorials.title: Multi-Modal Content Pipeline
tutorials.description: Set up automated content creation with text and image generation for marketing workflows.

faqs.question: How do I connect AWS Bedrock?
faqs.answer: Use AWS IAM credentials with Bedrock permissions. Best practice: use IAM roles for production workloads.

faqs.question: Which models are available?
faqs.answer: Claude (Anthropic), Llama (Meta), Titan (Amazon), Stable Diffusion (Stability AI), Jurassic (AI21), and more.

faqs.question: What are Guardrails?
faqs.answer: Built-in content filtering, PII detection, topic restrictions, and word filters for safe AI applications.

faqs.question: Can I fine-tune models?
faqs.answer: Yes! Customize models with your data through continued pre-training or fine-tuning for better performance.

faqs.question: What about Knowledge Bases?
faqs.answer: Managed RAG service that handles document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, and vector search automatically.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: Pay per token for inference. On-demand and provisioned throughput options available for different workloads.

testimonials.quote: Bedrock Knowledge Bases revolutionized our support. Accurate answers from 10K+ documents instantly.
testimonials.author: Amanda Stevens

testimonials.quote: Guardrails give us confidence to deploy AI widely. Content filtering catches everything problematic.
testimonials.author: Dr. James Park

testimonials.quote: Model choice flexibility is crucial. Switch between Claude, Llama, Titan based on task requirements.
testimonials.author: Maria Gonzalez

testimonials.quote: Fine-tuning on our data improved accuracy 40%. Custom models understand our domain perfectly.
testimonials.author: Robert Chen

limits.title: Token Limits
limits.description: Context windows vary by model (8K-200K tokens). Choose models based on your input size needs.

limits.title: Throughput
limits.description: On-demand has rate limits. Provisioned throughput guarantees capacity for consistent, high-volume use.

limits.title: Model Availability
limits.description: Models available in specific AWS regions. Check region availability for your chosen models.

limits.title: Fine-tuning
limits.description: Training data requirements and time vary. Larger datasets produce better results but take longer.
